Class Customer

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.Customer
public class Customer extends Object
Class that contains the comprehensive business logic for customer handling. It mainly consists of customer database CRUD operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Customer()
    Default constructor for Customer class.
    Customer(int customerID, String name, String email, String address, String phone, float creditLimit, String discountPlan, String status)
    Overloaded constructor for Customer class primarily used for customer retrieval.
    Customer(String name, String email, String address, String phone, float creditLimit, String discountPlan, String status)
    Constructor for Customer class primarily used for customer registration.

  • Constructor Details

    • Customer

      public Customer(String name, String email, String address, String phone, float creditLimit, String discountPlan, String status)
      Constructor for Customer class primarily used for customer registration.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the customer.
      email - The email of the customer.
      address - The address of the customer.
      phone - The phone number of the customer.
      creditLimit - The credit limit of the customer.
      discountPlan - The discount plan of the customer.
      status - The status of the customer.

    • Customer

      public Customer(int customerID, String name, String email, String address, String phone, float creditLimit, String discountPlan, String status)
      Overloaded constructor for Customer class primarily used for customer retrieval.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer.
      name - The name of the customer.
      email - The email of the customer.
      address - The address of the customer.
      phone - The phone number of the customer.
      creditLimit - The credit limit of the customer.
      discountPlan - The discount plan of the customer.
      status - The status of the customer.

    • Customer

      public Customer()
      Default constructor for Customer class.

  • Method Details

    • addCustomer

      public void addCustomer(Customer customer) throws org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException
      Adds a customer to the database.
      Parameters:
      customer - The customer to be added.
      Throws:
      org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException - If there is an error in the database operation.

    • getAllCustomers

      public ArrayList<Customer> getAllCustomers() throws org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException
      Retrieves all the customers from the database.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of Customer objects, each representing a customer.
      Throws:
      org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException - If there is an error in the database operation.

    • getCustomer

      public Customer getCustomer(int customerID) throws org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException
      Retrieve a specific customer from the database given their ID.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer to retrieve.
      Returns:
      A Customer object representing the customer.
      Throws:
      org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException - If there is an error in the database operation.

    • editCustomer

      public void editCustomer(Customer customer) throws org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException
      Edits a customer's details and updates the database.
      Parameters:
      customer - The customer to update the details for.
      Throws:
      org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException - If there is an error in the database operation.

    • deleteCustomer

      public void deleteCustomer(int id) throws org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException
      Deletes an existing customer from the database given their ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the customer to delete.
      Throws:
      org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException - If there is an error in the database operation.

    • updateAccountStatus

      public static void updateAccountStatus(int customerID, String status) throws org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException
      Dedicated method to update the account status of a customer, for the debt automation engine, given their ID.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer to update status.
      status - The new status to update the customer to.
      Throws:
      org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException - If there is an error in the database operation.

    • getLatestID

      public int getLatestID()
      Method to get the customerID of a newly registered customer which takes advantage of primary key auto-increment in SQLite. Used primarily for assignment of a discount plan during customer registration.
      Returns:
      The latest customerID.

      public void setCustomerID(int customerID)
